title: [codereview P2] OSCORE rules 5/6 in draft-lichen-schc-lora-00.md:A.3 and rules.rs:163 do not explicitly compress OSCORE option (RFC8613); clarify if it is sent in residue or needs FieldDescriptor for Option Delta/Length/Value. Potential interop gap. Security implication for E2E protection.
description: OSCORE compression description is incomplete. Rules stop at CoAP MID; OSCORE option (ID 21?) must be handled. Check python/src/lichen/coap/schc_channel.py and test vectors for how it's done. See spec/06-security.md. File: spec/drafts/draft-lichen-schc-lora-00.md:325
